name: build-loop
description: Orchestrated 5-phase development loop (Assess → Plan → Execute → Review → Iterate) plus optional Learn phase. Review combines critic, validate, optimize, fact-check, simplify, and report as ordered sub-steps. Built-in eval grading, fact verification, mock data scanning, and Sonnet-heavy execution with adversarial critic pass.
